blocks.descriptor: Gen X football fans are highly engaged viewers who prioritize traditional broadcast and family match-day experiences
blocks.title: football & Gen X

left.body: 23% more likely than the average person to watch live football  41% more likely than millennials to choose traditional TV

items.description: of Gen X football fans watch live matches weekly
of Gen X fans prefer TV broadcast over streaming

right.body: 35% more likely than younger fans to bring children to games  2.1x more likely than Gen Z to have lifelong club loyalty

items.description: of Gen X fans attend matches with family members
of Gen X supporters have followed their club 20+ years

items.description: of Gen X fans purchase official club merchandise annually
